heroImage: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(70, 70, 70, 0.86), rgba(105, 105, 105, 0.4)), radial-gradient(circle at 30% 18%, rgba(192, 192, 192, 0.26), transparent 34%), radial-gradient(circle at 78% 28%, rgba(169, 169, 169, 0.24), transparent 30%)

zh.eyebrow: 古城标志建筑声景档案
zh.title: 钟鼓楼·古城回鸣
zh.subtitle: 从晨间高塔的晨钟、脚步与人语，到暮色里古城的余韵，让滚动像一次见证古城沧桑的声景漫步，感受时间在这里的流逝。

scenes.subtitle: 晨钟 / Tower bell
scenes.title: 塔顶的钟声唤醒古城
scenes.description: 高耸的钟楼中，晨钟声在高空回荡，与下方街道的脚步、叫卖声融合，形成一个竖向的声景空间。

hotspots.label: 晨钟鸣响
hotspots.title: 晨钟鸣响
hotspots.text: 清晨时分，钟楼顶的古钟敲响，声音在古城的砖石间回荡，和远处的晨鸣一起形成具有年代感的音响地标。

hotspots.label: 骑楼回声
hotspots.title: 骑楼回声
hotspots.text: 风在骑楼的拱形走廊中吹过，会形成特有的低频共鸣，像老城墙在诉说着历史的故事。

scenes.subtitle: 午时 / Urban pulse
scenes.title: 街道赋予声音商业的脉搏
scenes.description: 午时的古城街道人声鼎沸，商贩的叫卖、行人的脚步在窄小的街道中层层叠加，形成一个密集而有质感的声响场景。

hotspots.label: 市井回响
hotspots.title: 市井回响
hotspots.text: 古城街道的建筑间距让每一个声音都有了回响，商业的热闹在砖石间被放大，让古城显得富有生命力。

scenes.subtitle: 暮色 / Time remains
scenes.title: 暮色中钟楼依旧独立
scenes.description: 夜幕降临后，街道逐渐安静，但钟楼的轮廓在灯光下更加清晰，它的存在跨越了千年的时间。

hotspots.label: 暮钟悠长
hotspots.title: 暮钟悠长
hotspots.text: 暮色中的钟声显得格外悠长而深沉，在安静的夜晚，它成为连接过去和现在的声音纽带。

en.title: Bell&Drum Tower: Ancient City Resonance
en.subtitle: From morning bell chimes, footsteps and voices, to twilight echoes across ancient streets, scroll through an acoustic journey witnessing the passage of time in this historic landmark.

scenes.subtitle: Morning Bell / Tower bell
scenes.title: Tower bells awaken the ancient city
scenes.description: High atop the bell tower, morning bells echo and blend with street-level footsteps and vendor calls, creating a vertical soundscape dimension.

hotspots.label: Morning Chimes
hotspots.title: Morning Chimes
hotspots.text: At dawn, the ancient bell rings atop the tower, its sound echoing through stone and brick, blending with morning birdsong to create a temporal landmark.

hotspots.label: Arcade Resonance
hotspots.title: Arcade Resonance
hotspots.text: Wind flowing through the archway corridors creates distinctive low-frequency resonances, as if the old city walls are recounting their historical narratives.

scenes.subtitle: Noon / Urban pulse
scenes.title: Streets pulse with commercial vitality
scenes.description: At noon, ancient streets bustle with vendor calls and footsteps layered densely in narrow passages, creating a rich and vibrant soundscape.

hotspots.label: Market Echo
hotspots.title: Market Echo
hotspots.text: Street-level architecture amplifies every sound—merchant calls resonate off brick and stone, bringing commercial energy and cultural vitality to the ancient city.

scenes.subtitle: Dusk / Time remains
scenes.title: The tower stands eternal through dusk
scenes.description: As night falls, streets grow quiet, yet the bell tower's silhouette becomes clearer under lights, spanning a thousand years of time.

hotspots.label: Evening Bells
hotspots.title: Evening Bells
hotspots.text: In twilight's hush, the bell's resonance deepens and lengthens, becoming a sonic bridge connecting past and present, ancient and modern.
